hero.title: Building the Future
hero.subtitle: A powerful holding company operating at international standards across construction, energy, mining, food, technology, and real estate.

about.teaser: Since 2001, DN Holding has been making pioneering investments across six different sectors, confidently advancing toward the future with its sustainable growth strategy.

companies.subtitle: With strong subsidiaries operating at international standards across six diverse sectors, DN Holding is one of Turkey's most dynamic holding structures.

about.pageSubtitle: The story, vision, and values of DN Holding.
about.intro: DN Holding is an international holding company founded in 2001, now operating across six different sectors. Guided by the principles of sustainability, innovation, and social responsibility, our group aims to be one of Turkey's strongest holding structures.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To be one of Turkey's strongest representatives on the global stage by creating value at international standards in every sector we operate in.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To add value to society, the environment, and our stakeholders through a sustainable growth strategy; to maintain our leadership in our sectors with innovative solutions.

list.title: Reliability
list.description: We operate with transparency and integrity in all our business processes.

list.title: Innovation
list.description: We closely follow technological developments and pioneer innovation in our sectors.

list.title: Sustainability
list.description: We create value for future generations with environmental and social responsibility awareness.

list.title: Excellence
list.description: We aim for the highest quality standards in every project we undertake.

list.title: People-Centric
list.description: We prioritize the development and well-being of our employees.

list.title: Collaboration
list.description: We build strong and long-term partnerships with our stakeholders.

timeline.title: Our History
timeline.subtitle: The journey of DN Holding from its founding to today.

milestones.title: Foundation
milestones.description: DN Holding was established in Istanbul. The first company, DN Construction, commenced operations.

milestones.title: Mining Investment
milestones.description: DN Mining was founded, marking entry into the natural resources sector.

milestones.title: Entering the Energy Sector
milestones.description: First investments in renewable energy were made through DN Energy.

milestones.title: Food Sector
milestones.description: DN Food was established, beginning operations in agriculture and food processing.

milestones.title: Real Estate Investments
milestones.description: Premium residential and commercial projects were added to the portfolio with DN Real Estate.

milestones.title: Digital Transformation
milestones.description: DN Technology was founded, initiating the group's digital transformation journey.

milestones.title: International Expansion
milestones.description: Transformed into a global holding structure with operations in 15 countries.

milestones.title: Record Growth
milestones.description: Historic records were set with over 3,000 employees and ₺4.2 billion consolidated revenue.

companies.pageSubtitle: With subsidiaries operating at international standards across six different sectors, DN Holding represents sustainable growth.

areas.pageSubtitle: The sectors DN Holding operates in and our strategic position in each area.

construction.name: Construction & Infrastructure
construction.description: Large-scale infrastructure projects, residential complexes, and commercial buildings. Highway, bridge, tunnel, and airport projects.

energy.name: Energy & Renewables
energy.description: Wind, solar, and hydroelectric power generation. Sustainable energy solutions and carbon-neutral targets.

mining.name: Mining & Natural Resources
mining.description: Copper, chrome, and gold mining. Environmentally responsible modern mining technologies.

food.name: Food & Agriculture
food.description: Organic farming, food processing, and international exports. Integrated farm-to-table production chain.

technology.name: Technology & Digital Solutions
technology.description: Artificial intelligence, IoT, cloud computing, and enterprise software solutions. Industrial digital transformation.

realEstate.name: Real Estate & Investment
realEstate.description: Premium residential, office, and shopping mall projects. Sustainable architecture and smart building technologies.
